entities.name: Profile
entities.note: A Profile is a subdivision of a Customer. Almost everything partitioned by CustomerId is also partitioned by ProfileId. Owns SmsGroups, FtpSettings, ProfileApiKeys, ConversationMappings, positive lists, storage files.
fields: CustomerId (int, NOT NULL, FK → Customers) — parent partition
SMSSendAs (nvarchar(100)) — sender label for outbound SMS
EmailSendAs (nvarchar(200)) — sender label for outbound email
TimeZoneId (nvarchar(100)) — Windows TZ id for nighttime detection
LookupMaxNumbers (smallint) — cap on lookup result size
MapZoomLevel (int?) — stored as zoom*10 for 1 decimal support
KvhxAddress (nvarchar(36)) — profile's own address KVHX code
collections: Roles: ICollection<ProfileRoleMapping> — capabilities granted to this profile
Users: ICollection<ProfileUserMapping> — users with access to this profile
SmsGroups: ICollection<SmsGroup> — messages owned by this profile
constraints: PK_Users (sic) on Id — primary key (misnamed constraint, actual PK on Profiles)
missing_constraints: NO UNIQUE on (CustomerId, Name) — duplicate-named profiles within a customer allowed

entities.name: ProfileUserMapping
entities.note: Many-to-many between Profile and User. Determines which users can access which profiles. No UNIQUE constraint verified.

entities.name: ProfileRoleMapping
entities.note: Assigns capability roles to a profile. All service-layer permission checks route through DoesProfileHaveRole(profileId, roleName).

entities.name: ProfileRole
entities.note: Named capability flags. 60+ roles defined in ProfileRoleNames enum. Examples: HaveNoSendRestrictions, CanSendByEboks, CanSendByVoice, UseMunicipalityPolList, CanSendToCriticalAddresses, SmsConversations, NorwayKRRLookup, Nynorsk, CitizenDialogue.

entities.name: ProfileRoleNames (enum)
entities.note: Canonical list of all capability toggles per profile. MUST be extended when adding to dbo.ProfileRoles.

entities.name: User.CurrentProfileId
entities.note: Session-state field. INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL. Holds the profile the user last selected/is currently using. Value 0 = not yet selected (new account or cleared). No FK constraint. Updated by UpdateCurrentProfileByUser() and by Login auto-assignment (single-profile case).

entities.name: ProfileApiKey
entities.note: API key scoped to a profile. Enables external systems to act as a specific profile.

entities.name: ProfileAccessModel / ProfileIdAccessModel
entities.note: Read models. ProfileAccessModel = { Profile, HasAccess }. ProfileIdAccessModel = { ProfileId, HasAccess }. Used in UI to list profiles user can/cannot access.

entities.name: ProfileRoleAccessModel
entities.note: Read model. { ProfileRole, HasAccess }. Used in admin UI to show which roles a profile has.
